calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Default
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Alycia R. Fleming.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43 a.m.

Hanna Kerfan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Evelyn Sican, Loan Adjuster and Custodian of Records for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. was present, placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Kerfan and Sican appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Alycia R. Fleming.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed September 17,2019.
Substitute Service on defendant Alycia R. Fleming, October 20, 2019 and effectuated on October 31, 2019.
Default as to both defendant Alycia R. Fleming entered on January 24, 2020.
There were no DOE defendants.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. submits to the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A Consumer Credit Card Customer Agreement & Disclosure Statement.......ID/EVID
Exhibit B Final Statement sent to Ms. Fleming..................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against Alycia R. Fleming, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,946.65.
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $540.00.
Total - $28,286.65.

Counsel for petitioner shall prepare the Proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

The parties STIPULATE to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings conclude at 9:57 a.m.
